Tests that `Math.min()` without arguments does not return `-Infinity`.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.min()` function in JavaScript. It verifies that calling `Math.min()` without any arguments does not return `-Infinity`. This test ensures that the function behaves as expected in this specific scenario, which is important for validating the correctness of mathematical operations in JavaScript environments. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this particular aspect of the `Math.min()` function.
